latin: Vir mane iterum expergefactus est et eundem diem vivebat. iterum atque iterum idem cantus ex machina sonabat. 'eheu,' suspiravit, 'rursus hic dies.'

questions.target: He keeps living the same day over and over
choices: He keeps living the same day over and over
He is stuck in a snowstorm

questions.target: The same song plays from the alarm
choices: The same song plays from the alarm

translation: The man woke again in the morning and was living the same day. Again and again the same song sounded from the machine. 'Alas,' he sighed, 'this day again.'
